text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On her day off, Haru Urara is in the shopping
district passing out flyers her fan club created.
They're asking people to vote for her so she can
enter the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While there, an Umamusume she raced against in
the February Stakes passes by.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the Umamusume sees that Haru Urara is
asking for votes rather than trying to enter on her
own racing merit, she chides her and storms off in
anger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara, watching her storm off, realizes that
what she's doing isn't right.
